data_note: Public dashboard tracking begins on Opening Night, March 25, 2026. Trained on 2024 and 2025 season data.

runs.label: Prepare
runs.description: Runs once after 6:00 AM ET, refreshes data, retrains the model for the day, settles any remaining prior results, and saves the fixed morning baseline slate.

runs.time_et: Every 15 minutes until last first pitch
runs.label: Mixed refresh
runs.description: Updates live results for started games while continuing to rerank and republish only the games that have not started yet.

runs.label: Settle
runs.description: Checks today’s picks from first pitch through final, marks HR or No HR, and archives the slate when every game is complete.

model_explainer.title: Model metric guide
model_explainer.summary: 25 metrics are active in the current model.

features.label: Peak Exit Velocity, Last 10 Days
features.description: Recent top-end exit velocity. This is used as a ceiling signal for raw home-run juice.
features.direction: Higher values generally boost the score

features.label: Platoon Advantage
features.description: Whether the hitter has the handedness advantage against the pitcher.
features.direction: Higher values generally boost the score

features.label: Pa Last 30D
features.description: This feature is included in the current model configuration.
features.direction: Higher values generally boost the score

features.label: Pitcher Barrel Split Allowed vs Batter Hand
features.description: The pitcher's barrel susceptibility against hitters of this handedness.
features.direction: Higher values generally boost the score

features.label: 95+ EV Rate, Last 30 Days
features.description: 30-day loud-contact rate, used to stabilize recent quality-of-contact signals.
features.direction: Higher values generally boost the score

features.label: Hard-Hit Rate, Last 30 Days
features.description: 30-day hard-hit trend, used as a broader measure of how consistently loud the hitter's contact has been.
features.direction: Higher values generally boost the score

features.label: Pa Last 10D
features.description: This feature is included in the current model configuration.
features.direction: Higher values generally boost the score

features.label: Pitcher Barrel Rate Allowed, Last 30 Days
features.description: How often recent contact against the pitcher has been barreled.
features.direction: Higher values generally lower the score

features.label: Barrel Rate, Last 30 Days
features.description: Longer recent barrel trend, used as a sustained power-quality signal.
features.direction: Higher values generally boost the score

features.label: Humidity
features.description: Projected humidity at the park. It is a lighter weather-context feature.
features.direction: Higher values generally boost the score

features.label: Average Exit Velocity, Last 10 Days
features.description: Average recent exit velocity. It measures how hard the hitter is striking the ball lately.
features.direction: Higher values generally lower the score

features.label: 95+ EV Rate, Last 10 Days
features.description: How often recent contact has cleared 95 mph. It is a compact proxy for current dangerous contact.
features.direction: Higher values generally lower the score

features.label: Hard-Hit Rate, Last 10 Days
features.description: Share of recent batted balls hit hard. This helps the model separate live contact quality from raw outcomes.
features.direction: Higher values generally lower the score

features.label: Wind Speed
features.description: Projected wind speed at the park. This gives the model weather context for carry conditions.
features.direction: Higher values generally boost the score

features.label: Park Factor vs Batter Hand
features.description: Home-run environment of the park for the hitter's handedness.
features.direction: Higher values generally boost the score

features.label: Pitcher 95+ EV Rate Allowed, Last 30 Days
features.description: Rate of very hard recent contact allowed by the pitcher.
features.direction: Higher values generally boost the score

features.label: Pitcher Hard-Hit Rate Allowed, Last 30 Days
features.description: Recent hard contact allowed by the opposing pitcher.
features.direction: Higher values generally boost the score

features.label: Pitcher HR Split Allowed vs Batter Hand
features.description: The pitcher's home-run susceptibility against hitters of this handedness.
features.direction: Higher values generally boost the score

features.label: Hitter Barrel Split vs Pitcher Hand
features.description: The hitter's barrel rate against pitchers of this handedness.
features.direction: Higher values generally boost the score

features.label: Handedness Barrel Matchup Blend
features.description: Combined hitter and pitcher handedness split for barrel quality.
features.direction: Higher values generally boost the score

features.label: Pitcher Avg Exit Velocity Allowed, Last 30 Days
features.description: Average exit velocity allowed by the opposing pitcher recently.
features.direction: Higher values generally lower the score

features.label: Barrel Rate, Last 10 Days
features.description: Recent barrel frequency, measuring how often the hitter is producing ideal home-run quality contact right now.
features.direction: Higher values generally lower the score

features.label: Pitcher HR Allowed Rate, Last 30 Days
features.description: How often the opposing pitcher has allowed homers recently. It measures matchup vulnerability.
features.direction: Higher values generally boost the score

features.label: Handedness Hard-Hit Matchup Blend
features.description: Combined hitter and pitcher handedness split for hard-contact tendency.
features.direction: Higher values generally lower the score

features.label: Temperature
features.description: Forecast game-time temperature. The live model uses weather as context, not as a primary driver.
features.direction: Higher values generally boost the score
